content.text:
All 13 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added high-enchantment surcharge in `itemSurchargeFor` — when `item.enchantment >= 5`, adds 30% of item base to the surcharge.
- Result: All tests now pass (13 passing, 33 todo).
- Approach: Minimal extension of the existing surcharge function. Reused `basePremiumFor` and additively accumulated surcharges so the cursed branch still works. Used `item.enchantment ?? 0` to safely handle undefined.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
